source.description: ASA IPsec site-to-site VPN with IKEv1 policy, pre-shared key, transform-set, crypto map, NAT exemption for VPN traffic

config.description: ASA site-to-site IPsec VPN with IKEv1 policy, tunnel-group with pre-shared key, crypto map on outside interface, NAT exemption for VPN traffic

expected_translation.high_level: Huawei USG equivalent with ike proposal, pre-shared-key, ipsec proposal, ipsec policy, and nat-policy for VPN traffic bypass

verification.notes: High-risk: IPsec VPN with NAT interaction. ASA crypto map and tunnel-group have no direct Huawei equivalent; requires most manual review of all corpus entries
